nasb.text: Miriam answered them, “Sing to the Lord, for He is highly exalted; The horse and his rider He has hurled into the sea.”

esv.text: And Miriam sang to them: “Sing to the Lord, for he has triumphed gloriously; the horse and his rider he has thrown into the sea.”

cnv.text: 米利暗應和著她們說：“你們要向耶和華歌唱，因為他高高地被高舉起來，他把馬匹和騎馬的投在海中。”

ccb.text: 唱道：“要歌颂耶和华，因祂大获全胜，把马和骑兵都抛进海中。”
